title: Circular 001/2025: Firearms (Variation of Fees) Order 2025
body: "The order amends sections of the Firearms Act 1968 and the Firearms (Amendment) Act 1988, to increase the fees charged by the police for:   granting or renewing firearm and shotgun certificates variation of firearm certificates replacement of lost or destroyed certificates registration as a firearms dealer granting visitors’ permits  "
